handoff.summary: Retrospective completed for extension UX workpack. A0-A5 were completed and verified at gate with PASS_WITH_CAVEATS, and R1 is now closed with action items for container alignment and accessibility labeling.
next_steps: Open or refresh PR from feature/extension-ux to main and merge after caveat triage decision.
Address caveats in follow-up: move tree view to the declared container or remove mismatch, and add unique aria-labels for per-prompt action buttons.
After merge, update workpack state from review to complete.
known_issues: View container mismatch remains: tree is shown under explorer while workpack-manager container is declared.
Detail panel Assign/Run controls still need per-prompt unique aria-labels for stronger accessibility.
Execution telemetry fields remain zeroed for this retrospective output.

notes:
1. Summary
- Workpack: 03_workpack-manager_extension-ux
- Duration: 2026-02-23 to 2026-02-26
- Agents Used: GitHub Copilot
- Total Prompts: 7 (A0-A5 + R1)
- Status: Complete

2. What went well
- UX scope was implemented end-to-end with clear separation across tree provider, detail panel, commands, and status visualization.
- Verification gate confirmed 9/9 acceptance criteria and 85/85 tests passing.
- Command contribution/registration parity was validated (11 declared and 11 registered).
- CSP and HTML escaping checks were explicitly covered in test evidence for the detail panel.

3. What could be improved
- Resolve view container mismatch earlier to avoid discoverability confusion in Explorer vs dedicated container.
- Bake accessibility checks into earlier prompts so unique aria-label issues are caught before A5.
- Capture prompt-level telemetry (tokens/duration) to improve effort estimate calibration.

4. UX-specific observations
- Tree hierarchy is intuitive (workpack -> sections -> prompts) and tested for correctness.
- Detail webview provides sufficient summary and prompt/output context for inspection workflows.
- Command names and context-menu placement are discoverable and validated against package.json.
- VS Code API limitation encountered: native tree/webview keyboard behavior is available, but finer accessibility semantics in repeated controls still need explicit labels.

5. Metrics
| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| Total prompts | 7 |
| Completed on first try | 6 |
| Required rework | 0 |
| Average prompt duration | Not instrumented (telemetry unavailable) |

6. Action items
| Action | Owner | Priority | Target |
|--------|-------|----------|--------|
| Align tree view container placement with contributes.viewsContainers | extension maintainers | P1 | Next UX patch |
| Add unique per-prompt aria-labels for Assign/Run actions in detail panel | extension maintainers | P1 | Next UX patch |
| Add protocol-level telemetry capture for output execution fields | tooling maintainers | P2 | Next tooling iteration |
| Add retrospective checklist item for accessibility semantics in webview controls | workpack maintainers | P2 | Next workpack template update |
